profile_error_invalid_file: The selected profile is invalid or corrupted.
options_dialog_subtitle: Personalize the interface and configure application behavior.
options_appearance_description: Choose the language and visual theme used throughout the application.
options_ffmpeg_path_description: Select the folder containing ffmpeg.exe, ffplay.exe, and ffprobe.exe.
options_log_settings_description: Choose how processing logs are stored and limited.
options_behavior_description: Control logging and how the application checks for new releases.
options_update_settings_description: Configure automatic checks and optional pre-release notifications.
options_update_check_automatically: Automatically check for updates when the application starts
update_up_to_date_message: You are using the latest version ({current_version}).
update_check_failed_message: The application could not check for updates. Please try again later.
update_check_in_progress_message: An update check is already running.
options_error_invalid_ffmpeg_path_messag: The directory must contain the ffmpeg.exe file. Please select a valid path.
options_error_ffmpeg_executable_message: The ffmpeg.exe file could not be found. Please check your path.
error_help_reference_msg: Please consult the help file (F1) for more information on how to download and configure FFmpeg.
empty_queue_placeholder: Drag and drop audio files or folders here
error_no_files_message: Please add at least one audio file to the list.
mastering_character_help_transparent: Transparent loudness normalization without additional character processing.
mastering_character_help_cohesive: Gentle broadband compression to improve cohesion and stability while preserving dynamics.
mastering_character_help_punchy: Controlled compression and a soft peak contour to increase presence and impact (punch).
mastering_character_help_aggressive: Stronger compression and a tighter peak contour for dense, aggressive material.
mode_dynamic: Dynamic (1 Pass) - Adjusts volume on the fly (Radio Style)
mode_linear: Linear (2 Passes) - Preserves dynamics (Recommended for Music)
normalization_cancel_process_message: Cancellation signal sent. Waiting for process to terminate...
status_error: An error occurred. Check the process log.
normalization_invalid_lufs_error_message: Target Loudness (LUFS) must be a numeric value between -70 and 0. True Peak (dBTP) must be between -9 and 0.
error_ffprobe_not_found_message: The file 'ffprobe.exe' was not found in the configured path. Some features like player timeline display or column details are limited. Please configure the complete FFmpeg suite.
play_error_ffplay_not_found_message: The file 'ffplay.exe' was not found. Playback is not possible. Please configure the complete FFmpeg suite.
error_help_not_found_message: The local help HTML file could not be found.
about_description:
This tool normalizes audio files using FFmpeg's loudnorm filter.
- Supports WAV, MP3, FLAC, AAC, OGG and more.
- Customizable LUFS and True Peak targets.
- Presets for common platforms like YouTube and Spotify.
- Log file for FFmpeg output.
- Options dialog for all settings.
about_opensource: This is open-source software, freely available under the MIT License.
joke_eq_message:
Did you really think I was real?

Sorry, but I simply don't have the time for a real implementation right now. Keep on rockin' though!
normalization_overwrite_message:
The output file '{file}' already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

(If you choose 'No', this file will be skipped.)
inspect_lbl_compilation: Album is a compilation of songs by various artists
inspect_copy_wait: Please wait for the analysis to finish before copying.
inspect_analysis_failed:
Analysis failed.
Could not read loudness data.
inspect_error_access_denied: Access Denied: The file is currently being used by another program (e.g., XMPlay, MP3 TagScanner, or an audio editor). Please close the other program and try again.
inspect_lbl_unsupported_artwork: Artwork editing is only supported for MP3, FLAC, and M4A files.

WAV.description: Uncompressed, lossless PCM container. Highly versatile for mastering, now offering fully customizable linear bit depth, floating-point options, and high-resolution sample rates.

MP3.description: The most universally compatible lossy audio format. Ideal for general playback across all devices, with newly added support for custom constant bitrates (CBR) and highly efficient variable bitrates (VBR).

FLAC.description: Compressed lossless format. Significantly reduces file sizes without any audio quality degradation, now offering explicit control over output sample rates and bit depth resolutions.

M4A.description: A modern MPEG-4 Audio container. Offers superior compression efficiency and quality over MP3 at comparable bitrates, featuring complete metadata tagging and cover artwork support.

OGG.description: An open-source lossy container format. Highly efficient and transparent, utilizing the Vorbis codec with newly supported options for high-quality variable (VBR) or constant (CBR) encoding.
